sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100108" key="sunecanqe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνεξ-ανθέω</orth>, <sense id="n100108.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">blossom</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">break out together</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.434b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
